name: Form Control

representativeVariants.desc: Checkbox with label + optional size annotation + optional new-tag
Range input 1-50 with mono count display
Text input with border focus state

structurePatterns: Checkbox: inline-flex, gap --space-sm, horizontally wrapped in groups
Checkbox groups: flex wrap, gap 6px 16px, categorized by sub-headers (编辑器/版本控制/运行时/设计)
Range slider: full width with count display on right, mono font
Text input: full width, border-color transition on focus
usageHints: Checkbox: tool/AI tool/platform/environment selection, each with [sizeGB] annotation
Range slider: project count per scenario (1-50), default 10 single / 5 multi
Text input: reserved for future use (v0.1.0 uses buttons/checkboxes/sliders only)
Checkbox labels include mono size annotations in brackets: [2GB], [15GB], [0GB]
New items marked with new-tag appended after size annotation
doNotInvent: No dropdown selects (replaced by button groups per design decision)
No radio buttons (checkboxes for multi-select, button groups for single-select)
No form validation error states (v0.1.0 scope)
